gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (252/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (252/ 8)
text: إِنَّ مِنَ التَّوَاضُعِ أَنْ يَجْلِسَ الرَّجُلُ دُونَ شَرَفِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Usman Bin Isa, from Haroun Bin Kharjat,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It is from the humbleness that the man sits below his nobility’.
en.sarwar: 9. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ibn Faddal and Muhsin ibn Ahmad from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) looked at a man of the people of Madina carrying something that he had purchased for his family. On seeing the Imam the man felt embarrassed. Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) said to him, ‘I can see that you carry what you have purchased for your family. I swear by Allah, had it not been because of the people of Madina I would have loved to buy things for my family and myself carry it to them.’”
